introSection: Big Lego Coaster is a steel inverted roller coaster currently located at Legoland Shanghai in Qingpu, Shanghai, China. It is a Family Coaster built by Bolliger & Mabillard. The ride passes through the "hands" of an oversized, tall Lego minifigure named Dada.
fullText:
Big Lego Coaster is a steel inverted roller coaster currently located at Legoland Shanghai in Qingpu, Shanghai, China. It is a Family Coaster built by Bolliger & Mabillard. The ride passes through the "hands" of an oversized, tall Lego minifigure named Dada.

Red track and yellow supports.
